questions.question: Low-density lipoprotein (LDL) is called 'bad' cholesterol because:

options.B: It can cause blockage in the arteries

questions.question: High-density lipoprotein (HDL) is called 'good' cholesterol because:

options.A: It keeps cholesterol from building up in the lining of the arteries
options.C: It helps keep your blood from clotting

questions.question: Besides high cholesterol, which of these is a major risk factor for heart disease?
Which of the following is a desirable total cholesterol level?
